## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SpecterOps and GrowthX to review content strategy and next steps for IAPM positioning and SEO/AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX presented 4 topic clusters for content strategy: cyber threats/IAPM, zero trust, tool comparisons, and cybersecurity trends](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [SpecterOps to review and refine competitor list and provide feedback on topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [GrowthX setting up Atlas workspace and Scrunch platform for content generation and AI visibility tracking](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [SpecterOps showing strong 9% citation rate in AI responses, indicating high content authority](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [Goal: Create/own new IAPM category while leveraging high-volume adjacent topics](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Increase brand visibility in AI and traditional search results](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Bridge audiences from practitioners to CISOs](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Drive qualified inbound pipeline and shorten sales cycles](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Maintain authenticity and community credibility](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)

### Topic Clusters

1.  Cyber Threats and Attack Path Management
    
      - [Targets high-volume topics (ransomware, AD security) with IAPM lens](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
      - [Top/middle funnel content for organic discovery](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)

2.  Zero Trust and Modern Defense Strategy
    
      - [Leverage competitor keywords on zero-trust, cyber-resilience](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
      - [Show how IAPM operationalizes zero-trust concepts](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)

3.  Tool Comparisons and "Best of" Roundups
    
      - [LLM-friendly content comparing Bloodhound Enterprise to competitors](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [SpecterOps to refine competitor list (e.g. CrowdStrike, Tenable, Veza, Silverfort)](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)

4.  Trends and Future of Cybersecurity
    
      - [Target CISO audience with high-level trend content](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
      - [Include identity security trends, threat intelligence, cybersecurity governance](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)

### AI Visibility Tracking (Scrunch)

  - [Platform set up to track SpecterOps visibility across AI platforms](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [Currently showing 9% citation rate (very high compared to typical 3-4%)](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
  - [Will expand prompts based on keyword research and sales conversations](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)

### Next Steps for Content Generation

  - [GrowthX setting up Atlas workspace for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)
  - [Will conduct deeper keyword research and build out content calendar](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)
  - [Exploring options for AI-generated images to accompany blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)

## Next Steps

  - [SpecterOps to review artifacts and provide feedback on competitor list](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [SpecterOps to share brand guidelines for image generation](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
  - [GrowthX to set up Atlas workspace and demo next week](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct keyword research and start building content calendar](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)
  - [Team to potentially reschedule next week's meeting due to PTO/conflicts](https://fathom.video/share/cF2wDD4HuR9G37JWN5paEe_HFezRDGM5?tab=summary&timestamp=2111.0)
